name: deepgravity-chat
description: Agentic chat participant for DeepGravity. Reads backend address from DEEPGRAVITY_BACKEND_URL env var or deepgravity.backendUrl setting.

chatParticipants.name: deepgravity
chatParticipants.description: Ask DeepGravity to read, write, or reason about your codebase.

deepgravity.backendUrl.markdownDescription: WebSocket URL of the DeepGravity backend (e.g., `http://192.168.0.32:19850`). If empty, falls back to `DEEPGRAVITY_BACKEND_URL` environment variable. If neither is set, chat will not connect.
